lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Greetings adventurer and welcome to the museum!

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: The museum has been constructed thanks to the efforts of adventurers across Gielinor, feel free to explore this floor or one below at your leisure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about this museum?

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Certainly.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: This museum was built as a monument to Gielinor and contains exhibits which showcase the wonders of the world brought to light by adventurers such as yourself.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: This floor was built some time ago but due to popular demand and some recent contributions the floor below has also been opened up for display.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: While we no longer require any contributions we'll happily take any unwanted excess that you may have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to contribute towards the museum.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Hmm, it appears you don't have anything on you to contribute. Come back if you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me the current progress towards finishing the museum?

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: The museum is finished! Feel free to enter if you have the time.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Greetings adventurer and welcome to the museum!

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Feel free to explore this floor at your leisure while the floor below is under construction.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about this museum?

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Certainly.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: This museum was built as a monument to Gielinor and contains exhibits which showcase the wonders of the world brought to light by adventurers such as yourself.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: This floor was built some time ago and is not as accurate as it once was.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Now, due to popular demand, the knights of Falador have decided to expand upon the displays to ensure that it includes all discoveries which have been made in recent years.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Unfortunately we lack the man power to acquire all of the resources required to build the displays.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: We'd appreciate it if you could donate any materials you find on your adventures.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd be happy to help. I'll keep an eye out for any useful materials.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: The knights of Falador appreciate your support.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pass, I don't have time to help.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: I understand, you adventurers are busy folk. If you change your mind make sure to let me know.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Feel free to explore this floor at your leisure while the floor below is under construction.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to contribute towards the museum.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Hmm, it appears you don't have anything on you to contribute. Come back if you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to contribute towards the museum.

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Marvelous! What would you like to contribute?

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: We appreciate your contribution. Do make sure to come back once the museum has been expanded and check out the exhibits!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me the current progress towards finishing the museum?

lines.speaker: Sir Pear Visor
lines.text: Of course. Here's the progress made so far.
